DEPT 7/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:CLAUDIA GALLAGHER/CLERK:G. SHULL. JURY TRIAL CONTINUED. COURT INSTRUCTS JURY. BAILIFF SWORN. JURY RETIRES TO DELIBERATE. ALTERNATE JURORS ARE PLACED ON PHONE STANDBY. STIP THAT OTHER JUDGE MAY TAKE VERDICT. JUDGE BENSON PRESENT FOR READBACK WHEN REQUESTED BY JURY. JURY RETURNS WITH VERDICT IN FAVOR OF DEFT. JURY POLLED BY CLERK. 4 JURORS ANSWER THAT THIS IS NOT THEIR VERDICT. JURY VOIR DIRED BY JUDGE MASON AND RETURNED TO JURY DELIBERATION ROOM. JURY AGAIN RETURNS WITH VERDICT; VERDICT IS IDENTICAL. WHEN JURORS ARE POLLED, 2 ANSWER THAT THIS IS NOT THEIR VERDICT. COURT ACCEPTS VERDICT. JURORS THANKED AND EXCUSED; ADMONITION IS LIFTED. DEFENSE COUNSEL TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. EXHIBITS ARE RETURNED TO PARTIES.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, SUBMISSION OF JUDGMENT STATUS, VERDICT REACHED CONTINUED TO DEC-27-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04
